emails.subject: Fit Factory Membership
emails.body: Fit Factory Membership Just a reminder. Your Fit Factory Dues is due in full December 31st. Thank you, Jennifer Ballas and The Fit Factory Board

emails.subject: RE: Fit Factory Membership
emails.body: RE: Fit Factory Membership I thought that I was paid up?

emails.subject: RE: Fit Factory Membership
emails.body: RE: Fit Factory Membership Hi- According to my books, you still owe December. I will go through and double check. I will let you know. Jen "Salisbury, Holden" <Holden.Salisbury@ENRON.com> 12/27/01 06:28AM I thought that I was paid up?
